creator: walter.pelissero@iesy.net
text:
make install of smb4k doesn't work.  It reports an error:
[...]
install -o root -g wheel -m 444 action_unmount_all.png /usr/local/share/doc/HTML/en/smb4k/action_unmount_all.png
install -o root -g wheel -m 444 configuration_superuser.png /usr/local/share/doc/HTML/en/smb4k/configuration_superuser.png

/bin/sh ../../admin/mkinstalldirs /usr/local/share/doc/HTML/en/smb4k
install -o root -g wheel -m 444 index.cache.bz2 /usr/local/share/doc/HTML/en/smb4k/
rm -f /usr/local/share/doc/HTML/en/smb4k/common
ln -s /usr/local/share/doc/HTML/en/common /usr/local/share/doc/HTML/en/smb4k/common

Stop in /usr/ports/net/smb4k.

How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/net/smb4k
	make install
